objective: Final pilot audit. Worker reviews the full ledger and confirms all pilot exit criteria are met, then pushes a pilot completion summary.
required_validation: Count total tasks in ledger and confirm >= 10 completed cycles
Confirm 0 file edits outside approved allowed_paths across all completed tasks
Confirm 100% approval-gated apply flow (no result applied without approval artifact)
Confirm full audit trail present for all completed tasks (task + result + approval JSON for each)
Confirm verify_site_kb_consistency.sh is present and executable
Confirm Architecture v1 baseline file is present
Confirm worker_ops_note.txt from TASK-0009 is present
Produce a pilot completion summary with pass/fail for each exit criterion
execution_instructions: Read pilot_v1/state/ledger.json and validate each exit criterion
Check file presence for all expected artifacts
git commit -m 'worker: add TASK-0010 pilot audit completion result'
commands_expected: cat pilot_v1/state/ledger.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(d['tasks']), 'tasks in ledger')"
pilot_exit_criteria: quarantine flow validated at least once
full task audit trail present for all completed tasks
